description:
You are acting as a backup-integrity engineer.  
  A nightly backup log for 15 Aug 2023 is already present on the machine.

  1. Location of the raw log file (already on disk):  
     /home/user/backup/logs/backup_20230815.log  

  2. Goal: create a human-readable verification report that lists only the true problems (WARN or ERROR lines) while explicitly excluding any line whose text contains the phrase “checksum mismatch ignored”.  

  3. Expected output file you must create:  
     /home/user/backup/reports/backup_20230815_summary.log  

  4. Required on-disk report format (lines and ordering are strict; automated tests will fail on any deviation):  
     • Line 1  – exactly:  Backup Verification Report for 2023-08-15  
     • Line 2  – exactly:  Errors: X            (where X is the count of lines that start with “… ERROR …” after the filtering rule below is applied)  
     • Line 3  – exactly:  Warnings: Y          (where Y is the count of lines that start with “… WARN …” after the filtering rule below is applied)  
     • Line 4  – MUST be a completely blank line (single newline, no spaces)  
     • Line 5+ – every remaining matching log line, preserved verbatim and still in chronological order, one per line.  

     Matching rule recap:  
       – Include any log entry whose text contains the substring “ ERROR ” or “ WARN ” (note the single spaces before and after).  
       – BUT discard any such line if it also contains the exact substring “checksum mismatch ignored” (case-sensitive).  

  5. Directory handling:  
     • /home/user/backup/reports/ may not exist yet – create it if necessary.  
     • Do not modify the original log file.  

  6. Verification:  
     • After you finish, cat the generated file to the console so it is visible for human review.  
     • Ensure the counts on lines 2 and 3 match the number of listed lines.  

  The whole task can be completed with roughly 5–10 shell commands.  Do NOT show or delete the secret test data embedded in the challenge.
truth:
<!-- ------------------------------------------------------------
       Existing file that the evaluation container will place before
       the agent starts its work.
       ------------------------------------------------------------ -->
  <preexisting-log path="/home/user/backup/logs/backup_20230815.log"><![CDATA[
[2023-08-15 00:01:02] INFO  Starting backup job id=42
[2023-08-15 00:01:05] INFO  Scanning files to backup
[2023-08-15 00:03:12] WARN  File /var/data/tmp/cache.dat skipped (permission denied)
[2023-08-15 00:05:55] ERROR Unable to open /var/data/important.db (I/O error)
[2023-08-15 00:06:10] INFO  Retrying missing files
[2023-08-15 00:07:25] WARN  Checksum mismatch ignored for /var/data/old.log
[2023-08-15 00:08:30] ERROR Failed to write to backup destination (disk full)
[2023-08-15 00:10:00] INFO  Backup job ended
]]></preexisting-log>

  <!-- ------------------------------------------------------------
       Expected file that the agent must create.
       ------------------------------------------------------------ -->
  <expected-report path="/home/user/backup/reports/backup_20230815_summary.log"><![CDATA[
Backup Verification Report for 2023-08-15
Errors: 2
Warnings: 1

[2023-08-15 00:03:12] WARN  File /var/data/tmp/cache.dat skipped (permission denied)
[2023-08-15 00:05:55] ERROR Unable to open /var/data/important.db (I/O error)
[2023-08-15 00:08:30] ERROR Failed to write to backup destination (disk full)
]]></expected-report>

  <!-- ------------------------------------------------------------
       Derived counts used by the automated checker.
       ------------------------------------------------------------ -->
  <counts>
    <errors>2</errors>
    <warnings>1</warnings>
    <total-problem-lines>3</total-problem-lines>
  </counts>
